# 火山引擎官方文档本地参考

这些文件是按 **2026-04-15** 对照火山引擎官方文档整理的本地参考快照，目的不是替代原文，而是把当前项目真正用到的字段、限制和测试要点固定下来，方便联调和排障。

## 目录

- `start_voice_chat_2024.md`
- `s2s_and_dialog_ownership.md`
- `long_term_memory.md`
- `turn_detection_and_tts.md`
- `callbacks.md`
- `knowledge_and_mcp.md`

## 官方链接总表

- [StartVoiceChat / UpdateVoiceChat / StopVoiceChat](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/2123348)
- [接入端到端实时语音大模型](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1902994)
- [接入记忆库（长期记忆）](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1899860)
- [判停与对话触发](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1544164)
- [自定义语音播放](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1449206)
- [接收消息通知回调](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/69820)
- [进阶功能总览](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1350595)
- [接入第三方大模型或 Agent](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/1399966)
- [新功能发布记录](https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6348/2100954)
